title: How was it that Shinji was the only person that didnt know
display_title: How was it that Shinji was the only person that didnt know
wikitext:
[]: How was it that Shinji was the only person that didn't know?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Oct 17, 2015 10:12 pm Like, having read the manga and seen Rebuild, looking back I have to wonder how Shinji was the only person that didn't know Touji was the Fourth Child or Kaworu was the final angel. Everyone who met Kaworu knew from the get go something was up with him, even Rei 3, and she was almost a zombie up until after episode 24. And literally everyone but Shinji somehow knew Touji was the pilot of EVA-03, even friggin' Kensuke knew before he did. How was it Shinji was the last to know all this crap?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 17, 2015 10:49 pm Regarding Shinji's knowledge of Touji as the 4th Child: I don't believe this is his fault, since everybody who knew actively kept the knowledge away from him (in order to protect his feelings). The ones who did know were either on a need to know basis (Misato, Ritsuko), or they happened upon it by accident (Asuka). Kensuke had no knowledge of it until afterward, although he did make a joke to Shinji about Touji possibly being the new pilot prior to the incident. Rei was apparently aware of it, even before Touji asked her if she knew. As for Kaworu: I'd chalk it up to Shinji's ignorance, as well as his desperation for companionship that made him blind to Kaworu's true nature.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Oct 18, 2015 1:47 pm For Kaworu, in the original series he's not exactly privvy to the sync test results of other pilots which made Kaworu suspicious, and in Rebuild everyone had a decade and a half to learn about Kaworu and all kinds of nonsense.

[]:             Quote Post by Moap » Sun Oct 25, 2015 1:43 am Shinji didn't think Kaworu was an Angel because he loved him and didn't want him to be an Angel, he definitely knew something was up with him though. Even when Shinji is told by Misato that Kaworu is an Angel he says something along the lines of, "I refuse to believe Kaworu is an Angel!" That's denial in my book.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Oct 25, 2015 5:01 am In Kaworu's case, there weren't many red flags that Shinji could have noticed. Seele's practically rubbing him in Gendo's face, and Misato's hot on Nerv/Seele's trail so everything about Kaworu's appearance is extremely suspect. Shinji isn't privy to any of that information so Kaworu would just seem like another (rather odd) kid.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 12, 2015 6:20 am KAWORU : HELLO Shinji IKARI-KUN! DON'T CALL ME NAGISA, CALL ME KAWORU! YOU DON'T KNOW ME BUT I KNOW YOU SOMEHOW! AREN'T I FRIENDLY! AND STRANGE-LOOKING, TOO! NOTICE HOW I'M SITTING ON THIS BIG STATUE OUT IN THE WATER AND MY CLOTHES AREN'T REMOTELY WET! THE END OF THE SCENE WILL CONVENIENTLY CUT AWAY BEFORE WE CAN SEE HOW I GET DOWN, AS WELL! BY THE WAY, AREN'T YOU EVEN REMOTELY CURIOUS WHAT A 'LILIN' IS AND WHY I'D BE THROWING SUCH A PECULIAR TERM INTO CASUAL CONVERSATION? Shinji : He's so nice...

[]:             Quote Post by Iuvenal » Thu Nov 12, 2015 8:16 am Reichu wrote: NOTICE HOW I'M SITTING ON THIS BIG STATUE OUT IN THE WATER AND MY CLOTHES AREN'T REMOTELY WET! THE END OF THE SCENE WILL CONVENIENTLY CUT AWAY BEFORE WE CAN SEE HOW I GET DOWN, AS WELL!

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Nov 12, 2015 2:44 pm Also, Shinji did ask about how Kaworu knew his name and Kaworu did give a plausible explanation. "Everyone knows you're name you're fuckin' famous."

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Nov 12, 2015 3:20 pm Reichu: Where the caps really necessary?

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Thu Nov 12, 2015 3:33 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: Reichu: Where the caps really necessary?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Nov 12, 2015 3:47 pm Lavinius wrote: Don't backseat mod. : ^)

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Nov 12, 2015 3:47 pm Hey, a back-seat modding competition? Wow!

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Thu Nov 12, 2015 4:02 pm Reichu wrote: KAWORU : HELLO Shinji IKARI-KUN! DON'T CALL ME NAGISA, CALL ME KAWORU! YOU DON'T KNOW ME BUT I KNOW YOU SOMEHOW! AREN'T I FRIENDLY! AND STRANGE-LOOKING, TOO! NOTICE HOW I'M SITTING ON THIS BIG STATUE OUT IN THE WATER AND MY CLOTHES AREN'T REMOTELY WET! THE END OF THE SCENE WILL CONVENIENTLY CUT AWAY BEFORE WE CAN SEE HOW I GET DOWN, AS WELL! BY THE WAY, AREN'T YOU EVEN REMOTELY CURIOUS WHAT A 'LILIN' IS AND WHY I'D BE THROWING SUCH A PECULIAR TERM INTO CASUAL CONVERSATION? Shinji : He's so nice...
